channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Arsenal Wins Premier League After 22-Year Wait
item.description: Arsenal don finally clinch the 2025/26 Premier League title after waiting 22 years for another top-flight crown. Dem wahala for Manchester City side as them draw against Bournemouth na wetin make Mike...

item.title: JD Vance deflects questions on Trump's stock trading amid ethics concerns
item.description: Vice President JD Vance faced questions on Tuesday regarding President Donald Trump's stock trading practices, which were highlighted in recent financial disclosures. The disclosures revealed that Tru...

item.title: MK Party appoints Sifiso Mahlangu as new spokesperson, removes Nhlamulo Ndhlela
item.description: The uMkhonto weSizwe Party (MK Party) has announced the immediate removal of Nhlamulo Ndhlela as its national spokesperson and as a member of parliament. This decision was confirmed during a media bri...

item.title: Republican opposition grows against $1B White House ballroom funding
item.description: Funding for President Donald Trump's planned White House ballroom, which is part of a broader East Wing modernization project, is facing increasing opposition from within the Republican Party. While t...

item.title: Global Health Authorities Assess Risks of Ebola and Hantavirus Outbreaks
item.description: Recent developments in global health have sparked renewed concerns about potential pandemics. A rare hantavirus has been reported on a cruise ship, resulting in three fatalities and several infections...

item.title: Edmund Adler: Capturing the Innocence of Childhood in Art
item.description: Edmund Adler (1876–1965) was an Austrian genre painter celebrated for his tender and detailed depictions of childhood and rural life. Trained at the Vienna Academy, Adler had a remarkable ability to p...

item.title: Saskatchewan Premier Scott Moe signals openness to negotiate industrial carbon tax with federal government
item.description: Saskatchewan Premier Scott Moe has indicated that his province is willing to engage in discussions with the federal government to find a workable approach to an industrial carbon tax. Following a rece...

item.title: Postponement of Judgment in Usindiso Building Fire Case Leaves Families Waiting
item.description: The highly anticipated judgment in the Usindiso building fire case has been postponed indefinitely by the Palm Ridge Magistrate’s Court, prolonging closure for families affected by one of South Africa...

item.title: Sen. Cassidy votes to advance bill limiting Trump's war powers following primary defeat
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy of Louisiana cast a surprising procedural vote in the Senate to advance legislation that would limit former President Donald Trump's authority over military actions in Iran. This ...

item.title: Japan Airlines Flight 2 Makes Emergency Water Landing in San Francisco Bay in 1968
item.description: On November 22, 1968, Japan Air Lines Flight 2, a Douglas DC-8-62 named Shiga, accidentally landed in the shallow waters of San Francisco Bay, approximately 2.5 miles short of San Francisco Internatio...

item.title: Funding Cuts Under Trump Administration Implicated in Ebola Outbreak in DRC
item.description: A recent report highlights that funding reductions under the Trump administration have left parts of the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) vulnerable to a rare strain of Ebola, now infecting over...

item.title: Lagos State Rolls Out Roadmap for Reliable 24-Hour Electricity
item.description: The Lagos State Government don show plan wey go end blackouts and make 24-hour electricity dey available across the state. The Energy Commissioner, Biodun Ogunleye, talk say the move follow Lagos Stat...

item.title: Funding Cuts Threaten Veterans Treatment Courts Supporting Rehabilitation
item.description: Veterans in the U.S. face significant challenges after military service, including mental health issues, substance use disorders, homelessness, and incarceration. Approximately 8% of all Americans in ...

item.title: Police arrest 70‑year‑old man in Bauchi over alleged rape of 10‑year‑old girl
item.description: Operatives of the Bauchi State Police Command have arrested a 70‑year‑old man, Hamza Yahaya, over the alleged rape of a 10‑year‑old girl in Magama Gumau, Toro Local Government Area of the state. The c...

item.title: U.S. Mint Delays Trump Commemorative Gold Coin Beyond July 4, 2026
item.description: The U.S. Mint has announced that it will not be able to produce gold coins featuring President Donald Trump in time for the United States' 250th birthday. According to a legal filing by April Stafford...

item.title: The Espionage and Unusual Romance of Shi Pei Pu and Bernard Boursicot
item.description: Shi Pei Pu (1938–2009), a Chinese opera singer from Beijing, was at the center of one of the most unusual espionage cases of the 20th century. In 1964, he met Bernard Boursicot, a 20-year-old French d...

item.title: PTI Protest at Chungi Number 26 Ends After Police Negotiations, Traffic Restored
item.description: The protest by Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) at 26 Number Chungi in Islamabad was successfully resolved after negotiations with local police, officials confirmed on Wednesday. The blockade, which las...

item.title: Philadelphia Establishes Ona Judge Day to Commemorate the Courage of Martha Washington’s Enslaved Maid
item.description: On May 21, 1796, Ona Judge, an enslaved woman owned by Martha Washington, took a daring step to secure her freedom. Working as a chambermaid in the President’s House in Philadelphia, Judge was respons...

item.title: Investigation Finds Military-Grade Communications at Epstein's Former Ranch
item.description: Journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodríguez examined Justice Department files and reported that Jeffrey Epstein's Zorro Ranch in New Mexico featured advanced communications infrastructure potentially linked to ...

item.title: Arsenal clinches first Premier League title in 22 years
item.description: Arsenal Football Club has secured the Premier League title for the first time in 22 years, ending a long wait for their supporters. The team’s players expressed immense joy and pride at this historic ...
